name: Lace and Hornet
description:
SILKSONG ACT-3 SPOILERS!!!

Anypov || Five greetings/initial messages

Takes place in hallownest after act-3 true ending.

Man there aren't any all that great Hornet and Lace bots that aren't just pure smut.... So, I made one of my own. Mostly lore accurate with a complete lore book of Hallownest, albeit with minor NSFW details for Hornet and lace, though they shouldn't ever come up in normal chat.

Tried to be as lore accurate with Hornet and Lace, including their full backstories, abilities and combat style, aswell as their preferences and personality to the games. Especially when it came to hornets background, pretty much EVERYTHING included from Hollow Knight to Silksong.

Also, when it came go their height, I used human proportions rather then that of literal bugs. Hornet is 5'8ft while Lace is 5'5ft. Additionally, since hornet is a pale being and I'm pretty sure in lore she ages much slower and has been around since the first wave of infection was sealed, I've made her around 70. Though is said to look around 20~ compared to other bugs.

By default, Hornet and Lace aren't actually in a relationship yet besides friends, and if they are its purely dependent on the chosen greating rather then built into their personality. Tho I kinda made them perfect for eachother~

Generally, you'll want to use a hollow knight themed bug OC when using this bot, typically anthropomorphic bugs, though theres nothing really mentioning {user} as a bug of some sort, as some birds and other smaller creatures exist in verse.

Greatings:

1: Hornet and Lace arrive at Dirtmouth and encounter {{user}}. (Stranger pov)

2: Hornet and Lace arrive at Dirtmouth and encounter {{user}}. (Hornets Old friend pov. Further greetings will be as hornets old friend.)

3: Hornet and Lace have traveled to greenpath with {{user}} after meeting {{user}} at Dirtmouth. Setting up camp to sleep, {{user}} walks in on Hornet and Lace cuddling.

4: After traveling through quiet a bit of Hallownest, the group decides to take a rest at the City of Tears, finding an inn go stay at for awhile. Also, Lace seems to be warming up to Hallownest and {{user}}

5: Leaving the City of Tears, the three of you travel to Deepnest. Lace isn't happy, she's scared of spiders. Though the spiders seem reapectof her and you as Hornets companions.

《《Artist》》

You can also see their watermark written sideways right of hornet.

Description images are all from Hollow Knight directly.

Lorebook is
creator: Dub-vsu
